'''{{PAGENAME}}''' is a Gaiad character mentioned in chapter(s) 1 and 2 and 3 and 5 and 10 and 11 and 12 and 15 and 19.

[[Category:Generated Gaiad character entries for the 1st 62 chapters]]
[[Category:Removed redirects]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:Newest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
